# Australia's Budget 2026 Matrix

This site publishes a structured 120-cell scenario matrix for Australia's Budget 2026 CGT and negative gearing changes.

Primary URLs:
- Human page: https://budget-2026-cgt-negative-gearing-matrix.pages.dev/
- Structured matrix data: https://budget-2026-cgt-negative-gearing-matrix.pages.dev/data/matrix.json
- JSON schema: https://budget-2026-cgt-negative-gearing-matrix.pages.dev/data/schema.json
- Source spec: https://budget-2026-cgt-negative-gearing-matrix.pages.dev/data/SPEC.md
- Agent context JSON: https://budget-2026-cgt-negative-gearing-matrix.pages.dev/.well-known/ai-context.json

How to read the site:
- The matrix is organised by archetype, life stage, and policy scenario.
- Each cell contains an action, rationale, expected payoff, regret branch, and key assumption.
- `expectedPayoff` evaluates the action under the scenario; it is not a probability or vote recommendation.
- The content is decision-support analysis, not personal financial advice.

Related resources:
- Methodology: https://factual-au.setiyaputra.me/fact-check/budget-2026-fairer-tax-without-penalising-aspiration-claim/
- Calculator: https://australia-cgt-reform-calculator.setiyaputra.me/
- Source code: https://github.com/suryast/budget-2026-matrix
